general.title: Boxplot [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions: Create a boxplot visualization of the features in the analysis dataset.\ Please refer to DUET Documentation,  GitHub Documentation

parameters.name: Table to Visualize
parameters.description: Source table to perform the visualization. Default is Original, referring to the raw dataset.

parameters.name: Feature(s) to Plot
parameters.description: The feature(s) to plot in the box plot. Default "All" will plot all features.

parameters.name: Primary Annotation
parameters.description: The annotation to group the visualizations. Use "None" to disable.

parameters.name: Secondary Annotation
parameters.description: Secondary annotation to create subdivisions within each category defined by the primary annotation, offering a deeper level of analysis, such as comparing time points within each treatment condition. Default is "None".

parameters.name: Value Axis Log Scale
parameters.description: Make the Y-axis (or X-axis if the plot is horizontal) in log scale. Negative values in the data disable the log scale.

parameters.name: Horizontal Plot
parameters.description: To plot the boxplot in horizontal orientation. Default is vertical.

parameters.name: Figure DPI
parameters.description: Higher the DPI, clearer the image.

parameters.name: Keep Outliers
parameters.description: True to keep the outliers for every feature, False to remove them
